x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI Agents learn event correlation patterns from grouped alert history and CI linkages. Strong CI linkage means every alert can be traced to specific infrastructure for AI pattern learning.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Alert Grouping Accuracy and CI Linkage
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable alert grouping by configuring correlation rules. Ensure CIs are linked to alerts via discovery and alert management rules. Target: 30%+ grouping rate, 80%+ CI linkage rate on recent alerts. AI Agents learn event correlation patterns from grouped alert history.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: Alert Grouping Accuracy and CI Linkage

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_f2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c13
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[AI Agents learn event correlation patterns from grouped alert history and CI linkages. Strong CI linkage means every alert can be traced to specific infrastructure for AI pattern learning.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Alert Grouping Accuracy and CI Linkage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No alerts in last 90 days',
            finding: 'No alerts found in the last 90 days. Alert grouping and CI linkage cannot be assessed — Event Management may not be in use.'
        };
    }

    var gaGrouped = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    gaGrouped.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaGrouped.addQuery('parent', '!=', '');
    gaGrouped.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaGrouped.query();
    var grouped = gaGrouped.next() ? parseInt(gaGrouped.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCI = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    gaCI.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaCI.addQuery('cmdb_ci', '!=', '');
    gaCI.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCI.query();
    var withCI = gaCI.next() ? parseInt(gaCI.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var groupPct = Math.round((grouped / total) * 100);
    var ciPct = Math.round((withCI / total) * 100);

    var actualValue = total + ' alerts (last 90 days) | ' + grouped + ' grouped (' + groupPct + '%) | ' + withCI + ' with CI linked (' + ciPct + '%)';

    if (groupPct >= 30 && ciPct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: groupPct + '% of alerts grouped and ' + ciPct + '% linked to CIs (last 90 days). Now Assist ITOM has strong event correlation and CI context for AI-assisted pattern learning.'
        };
    } else if (groupPct >= 10 || ciPct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Alert grouping at ' + groupPct + '% and CI linkage at ' + ciPct + '% (targets: 30% grouping, 80% CI linkage). Now Assist ITOM correlation accuracy will be reduced — configure correlation rules and ensure CI discovery is current.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Alert grouping at ' + groupPct + '% and CI linkage at ' + ciPct + '% (last 90 days). Now Assist ITOM AI event correlation cannot learn meaningful patterns without grouped alerts linked to CIs.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000372</number><order>190</order><remediation_guidance>Enable alert grouping by configuring correlation rules. Ensure CIs are linked to alerts via discovery and alert management rules. Target: 30%+ grouping rate, 80%+ CI linkage rate on recent alerts. AI Agents learn event correlation patterns from grouped alert history.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c13</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Alert Grouping Accuracy and CI Linkage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_f2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c13</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: Alert Grouping Accuracy and CI Linkage

sys_audit_delete.display_value: Alert Grouping Accuracy and CI Linkage

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Alert Grouping Accuracy and CI Linkage
